correction_sql.description: A single safe SQLite UPDATE statement or script that applies only approved case DQ-USG-2026-04-A to usage_daily and populates audit fields.

changed_row_count.description: Number of usage_daily rows changed by the approved correction.

total_compute_hours_after_fix.description: Qualified April 2026 ATLASDB compute hours for enterprise accounts after applying the correction.

field_types.region: string enum: NA, EMEA, APAC, LATAM

affected_accounts.description: Enterprise accounts whose corrected rows qualify for the recomputed ATLASDB usage metric.

field_types.region: string enum: NA, EMEA, APAC, LATAM

top_account_after_fix.description: The highest-compute qualified enterprise ATLASDB account after the fix, ordered by compute_hours descending and account_id ascending for ties.

audit_reason.description: Audit reason written by the correction and reported in the response.
